stepsCompleted.docNote: No frontend changes required for health-check-ci. The feature is a backend-only health endpoint (GET /api/health) with CI/CD env var injection. Verified existing frontend builds, tests (14/14), and lint pass cleanly.

Added GET /api/health endpoint (fn-health.ts, authLevel: anonymous) returning {status,mode} with STRICT_HEALTH_MODE env var. Added integration test and validate-app.sh hook for /api/health reachability.

No dead code found. Analysis: (1) roam_dead_code scanned app boundary — 40 safe candidates all in tools/ or config files outside app scope. (2) All health-check-ci feature symbols (fn-health, HealthStatus/HealthCheckEntry/HealthCheckResponse schemas) verified — schemas in packages/schemas/ protected by safety rules. (3) All frontend exports (Button, Input, getDemoToken, ThemeToggle, DemoAuthProvider, useDemoAuth, apiClient, NavBar) confirmed to have active consumers. (4) Backend: 26 tests pass, Frontend: 14 tests pass. Clean codebase with no dead code to eliminate.
